action.reasoning: Observation: Eval achieved mean_r2=0.4433 after zeroing near-zero variance columns. The model is small (4.4M params) and ptend_q R2 is only 0.2442, indicating underfitting. Analysis: Scaling model capacity should improve generalization on hard-to-predict humidity tendencies. Decision: Increase model size to ~13M params (1536x5+768), train for 5 epochs, and submit eval. Also adjust train.py R2 logging to set near-zero-variance columns to 0 for realistic tracking.
